title: 启用嵌套虚拟化
output:
Created VM: WMITEST_cpu_nested B8D09538-9FE7-4809-8FB5-5CB55C01A773
Before ExposeVirtualizationExtensions = False
ModifyResourceSettings rv=0
After ExposeVirtualizationExtensions = True
Cleanup DestroySystem rv=4096
RESULT: PASS readback=True modify_rc=0
notes: 嵌套虚拟化通过将 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData.ExposeVirtualizationExtensions 置为 $true 并调用 ModifyResourceSettings 启用，读回为 True 表示生效。
ModifyResourceSettings 返回 0 表示同步成功，返回 4096 表示异步任务，须轮询 Job。
该属性须在虚拟机处于停止态时修改，对运行中的虚拟机修改会失败；本示例使用新创建的空虚拟机，天然处于停止态。
嵌套虚拟化的实际运行（在来宾内启动内层虚拟机）还需主机 CPU 支持 VT-x/EPT，本示例仅验证 WMI 属性的写入与读回。
notes_en: Nested virtualization is enabled by setting Msvm_ProcessorSettingData.ExposeVirtualizationExtensions to $true and calling ModifyResourceSettings; a read back of True indicates it has taken effect.
ModifyResourceSettings returning 0 indicates synchronous success, and returning 4096 indicates an asynchronous job that must be polled.

This property must be modified while the virtual machine is in the stopped state; modifying a running virtual machine fails. This example uses a newly created empty virtual machine, which is naturally in the stopped state.

Actually running nested virtualization (starting an inner virtual machine within the guest) further requires host CPU support for VT-x/EPT; this example only verifies writing and reading back the WMI property.
